note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.flowplane module functions.

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the area of a flow plane.

methods.name: contact
methods.description: Get the flow plane associated with a contact.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the flowplane extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the flowplane group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: flowplane.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the flowplane. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this flowplane is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the flowplane id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: flowplane.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the flowplane is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: index
methods.description: Get the index (offset) of the given flow plane.

methods.name: local1
methods.description: Get the flowplane local 1 flowplane position (vector).

methods.name: local1_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the flowplane local 1 flowplane position.

methods.name: local1_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the flowplane local 1 flowplane position.

methods.name: local1_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the flowplane local 1 flowplane position.

methods.name: local2
methods.description: Get the flowplane local 2 flowplane position (vector).

methods.name: local2_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the flowplane local 2 flowplane position.

methods.name: local2_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the flowplane local 2 flowplane position.

methods.name: local2_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the flowplane local 2 flowplane position.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the flowplane flowplan position (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the flowplane flowplan position.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the flowplane flowplan position.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the flowplane flowplan position.

methods.name: prop
methods.description: Get a flow plane property.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the flowplane extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: flowplane.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the flowplane group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_prop
methods.description: Set a flow plane property.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this flowplane is live.

methods.name: vertexlist
methods.description: Get the flow plane vertex list for a given flow plane.

methods.name: zonelist
methods.description: Get the flowplane zone list for a given flow plane.
